story.text: Constraint on all of the above (the reviewer's warning): patrols add NO new judgment layer and stay level-triggered and silent unless a deficit is detected. The bad version (gate -> gateway -> patrol verdict -> extra approval -> extra queue) costs friction and worsens the bottleneck. The good version: patrol watches the seam and emits pressure/defect/stalled-pull signals; terminal pull consumes ready work directly. Value: adds sensing and auditability WITHOUT adding drag — preserves gate-friction without manufacturing more.

_note: A foreign review's finding, returned to package 'landing-throughput' and landed as proposed work through the inbound envoy seam (done-line 0059). The value gate judges the story; bdo's confirm-arc on 'epic.landing-throughput-response' queues the whole review at once. Never mutated — the fold over .ai-native/log/ is the live state (D-5).
